afterSnapshot.name: ROUTE_HEADWIND_ANGLE_DEG
afterSnapshot.description: Half-angle (degrees) within which the wind's FROM direction must align with the leg bearing to count as a headwind.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Headwind detection needs a tunable tolerance for how head-on the wind must be.
implementation: 60° matches the typical no-go zone where sailing directly upwind is impractical.
